testcase.name: test_current_quantity_field_present_and_correct

failure.message: AssertionError: BUG: forecast current_quantity=0.0 but stock product quantity=1.0 (likely reading wrong field name 'current_quantity' instead of 'quantity' in stock.py) assert 0.0 == 1.0 ± 1.0e-02 comparison failed Obtained: 0.0 Expected: 1.0 ± 1.0e-02

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_stock_forecast.py:63: in test_current_quantity_field_present_and_correct assert match["current_quantity"] == pytest.approx(sample["quantity"], rel=0.01), ( E AssertionError: BUG: forecast current_quantity=0.0 but stock product quantity=1.0 (likely reading wrong field name 'current_quantity' instead of 'quantity' in stock.py) E assert 0.0 == 1.0 ± 1.0e-02 E comparison failed E Obtained: 0.0 E Expected: 1.0 ± 1.0e-02
